reasoning: A telecom portal requires a high-visibility, 'command-center' feel. The Performance Pro archetype uses Deep Obsidian as a base with high-contrast Volt Blue and Electric Blaze accents, ensuring complex data (like usage gauges and invoice statuses) is easily legible while maintaining a premium, mobile-first aesthetic similar to top carriers.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6) between widgets, but generous internal padding (p-6) inside bordered containers to prevent collision.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Mobile-first. Left-align dense data, labels, and lists. Center align only major hero metrics if it improves visual rhythm.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Cardless or subtle roundness. Maximum border-radius of 8px (rounded-lg). Avoid heavy soft shadows.

header.classes: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 z-50 sticky top-0

data_visualizations.description: Use thick strokes for data consumption bars. Base track in #262626, active progress in #007AFF. Text inside gauge must be Pure White.

badges.paid: bg-[#34C759]/10 text-[#34C759] border border-[#34C759]/20 rounded-md px-2 py-1 text-xs font-bold
badges.overdue: bg-[#FF3B30]/10 text-[#FF3B30] border border-[#FF3B30]/20 rounded-md px-2 py-1 text-xs font-bold
badges.pending: bg-[#FF9500]/10 text-[#FF9500] border border-[#FF9500]/20 rounded-md px-2 py-1 text-xs font-bold

buttons.primary: bg-[#007AFF] hover:bg-[#3395FF] text-white font-bold rounded-lg px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.outline: bg-transparent border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/10 text-white font-bold rounded-lg px-6 py-3 transition-colors

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Always explicitly define hover text color (e.g., hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white). Ensure active states have a lighter hue than resting.
interactions_and_motion.focus_states: Must use focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#007AFF] focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-[#0A0A0A] for accessibility.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Use specific property transitions: transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out or transition-transform for micro-interactions (-translate-y-1 on card hover).

avatar_female.description: Smiling Brazilian woman profile picture for the personalized header greeting.

texture_bg.description: Subtle dark futuristic abstract texture to be used sparingly behind major cards or the hero header area.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: Every interactive element (PIX copy button, view invoice, expand line details) MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, role-based.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure a minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text and 3:1 for large text. No transparent backgrounds behind critical text.

instructions_to_main_agent: Read this JSON and implement a responsive, mobile-first dashboard layout.
Update tailwind.config.js to include the exact colors (Obsidian base #0A0A0A, Volt Blue #007AFF) and font families (Outfit, Manrope).
Add 'Manrope' and 'Outfit' fonts via Google Fonts in index.html or global css.
Create a sticky top navigation header using the Crystal Glassmorphism surface styling. Display a placeholder styled text 'HomeOn' as the logo and the 'avatar_female' image.
Below the header, display a personalized greeting: 'Good morning, [Name]!' in H2 font.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid layout for the data widgets.
Build a primary 'Data Usage' card showcasing a progress bar or circular gauge component utilizing the brand_accents.primary color.
Add tightly packed, colored summary mini-cards for 'Minutes Used' and 'SMS Used'.
Create a 'Quick Summary' section showing active lines and next invoice status.
Build an 'Invoices' list section where each invoice item uses the provided status badges (Paid/Overdue/Pending). Include a highly visible 'Copy PIX Code' button.
Ensure the UI uses 'Tactical Minimalism': 1px solid borders on cards instead of soft drop shadows, keeping it flat, dense, and tech-forward.
All components should be pure HTML+Tailwind or heavily customized Shadcn components meeting the 1px border rule.
Ensure you use 'lucide-react' for all icons. Add 'data-testid' to every interactive button and link.
